description: On this page, you can update your profile details such as first name, last name, and profile photo. This information will be visible at work and during reservations. Make sure your data is up to date!
imageInformation: To add a profile photo, first delete the previous one if set.</br>Then click the button: Add profile photo.</br></br>Allowed formats: jpeg, png, webp.</br>Maximum image size: 2MB.
title: User profile
